# Repository metadata guidance

Repository owners can apply this public metadata in GitHub settings:

- **Description:** `Local-first multi-agent coding runner with reviewable plans, visible cost, and reliability-first recovery.`
- **Website:** npm package or project documentation URL until a hosted read-only demo exists.
- **Topics:** `ai-agents`, `agent-orchestration`, `multi-agent`, `coding-agents`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `local-first`, `self-hosted`, `typescript`, `developer-tools`

Do not claim “durable,” “restart-safe,” “hard budget stop,” or “isolated writes” in metadata until the corresponding [failure matrix](../docs/failure-matrix.md) tests pass.
